name: Context Budget Alert
description: Alerts when session token usage exceeds 500K tokens, suggesting to start fresh or compact.

then.command: STATS=$(cat | jq -r '.session_stats // empty'); [ -z "$STATS" ] && exit 0; TOKENS=$(echo "$STATS" | jq -r '.total_tokens // 0'); [ "$TOKENS" -gt 500000 ] && echo "⚠️ Session at ${TOKENS} tokens. Consider /compact or starting a new session." >&2; exit 0
